improvements: Require pushing current branch changes before invoking Code Review Agent so compare links are reviewable.
Require explicit implementation and negative tests for any acceptance criterion phrased as required content (for example required player names).
When validating integer fields in Python, require tests for bool values because bool is a subclass of int.
Require at least one positive test for each valid boundary and one negative test for each invalid boundary.
Prefer structured error codes in validation results so downstream routing and tests do not depend on fragile message text.
